[
  {
    HintName: TestApp.ArrayReturnCommandsRouter.g.cs,
    Source:
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Ryn.Ipc;

namespace TestApp;

file sealed class ArrayReturnCommandsRouter : ICommandRouter
{
    public bool CanRoute(string command) => command is "getTags";

    public async ValueTask<string> RouteAsync(
        string command, ReadOnlyMemory<byte> args, IServiceProvider services, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        switch (command)
        {
            case "getTags":
            {
                using var __doc = JsonDocument.Parse(args);
                var __root = __doc.RootElement;
                var __has0 = __root.TryGetProperty("prefix", out var __prop0);
                if (!__has0)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("getTags", "prefix", "required argument is missing");
                if (__prop0.ValueKind == System.Text.Json.JsonValueKind.Null)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("getTags", "prefix", "argument must not be null");
                var __p0 = __ReadArg(__prop0, static __e => __e.GetString()!, "getTags", "prefix", "argument must be a JSON string");
                var __result = global::TestApp.ArrayReturnCommands.GetTags(__p0);
                if (__result is null) return "null";
                var __sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder("[");
                for (var __i = 0; __i < __result.Length; __i++)
                {
                    if (__i > 0) __sb.Append(',');
                    __sb.Append(__ToJson(__result[__i]));
                }
                __sb.Append(']');
                return __sb.ToString();
            }
            default:
                throw new RynCommandNotFoundException(command);
        }
    }

    private static string __ToJson(string? value)
    {
        if (value is null) return "null";
        var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder(value.Length + 2);
        sb.Append('"');
        foreach (var c in value)
        {
            switch (c)
            {
                case '\\': sb.Append("\\\\"); break;
                case '"': sb.Append("\\\""); break;
                case '\n': sb.Append("\\n"); break;
                case '\r': sb.Append("\\r"); break;
                case '\t': sb.Append("\\t"); break;
                case '\b': sb.Append("\\b"); break;
                case '\f': sb.Append("\\f"); break;
                default:
                    if (c < ' ' || c == '\u2028' || c == '\u2029')
                        sb.Append($"\\u{(int)c:X4}");
                    else
                        sb.Append(c);
                    break;
            }
        }
        sb.Append('"');
        return sb.ToString();
    }

    // Runs a single JSON->parameter conversion and reshapes a type mismatch into a
    // descriptive RynIpcArgumentException (naming the command + parameter), matching the
    // missing/null guards above instead of leaking System.Text.Json's opaque exception.
    // The reader is a non-capturing `static` lambda, so the delegate is cached (no per-call alloc).
    private static T __ReadArg<T>(
        System.Text.Json.JsonElement element,
        System.Func<System.Text.Json.JsonElement, T> read,
        string command, string parameter, string reason)
    {
        try
        {
            return read(element);
        }
        catch (System.Exception __ex) when (
            __ex is System.InvalidOperationException
                or System.FormatException
                or System.OverflowException
                or System.Text.Json.JsonException
                or System.IndexOutOfRangeException)
        {
            throw new RynIpcArgumentException(command, parameter, reason);
        }
    }
}

public static class ArrayReturnCommandsRynExtensions
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddArrayReturnCommands(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton<ICommandRouter, ArrayReturnCommandsRouter>();
        return services;
    }
}

  }
]
